title: Client Relations & Sales Support Executive
description:
Join Us at VIZZIO.AI – Where Extraordinary Happens!

Are you driven by ambition and the desire to achieve greatness? We're seeking passionate individuals who are ready to make an impact.

About Us:

VIZZIO Technologies Pte Ltd is a leading company based in Singapore that specializes in mapping and modeling cities into high fidelity 3D models. Using an AI automated pipeline, VIZZIO generates dimensionally accurate and geo-specific parametric and 3D digital twins from satellite and street images, videos, and point clouds. With 89 3D cities mapped to date, covering over 29.4 million square kilometers of land area, VIZZIO aims to create a digital twin of the entire planet Earth for various applications such as simulation, visualization, urban planning, smart city initiatives, and security & defense.

POLYTRON.AI, a subsidiary of VIZZIO, leads the way in AI-powered LIVE 3D™ camera technology with a patented special-purpose embedded chip that generates "360 3D Video," creating real-time virtual spaces.

Together, we are here to revolutionize real-time 3D technology. Our goal is to push the boundaries of real-time 3D visualization, offering innovative tools that enhance user experience and operational efficiency across various industries.

Role Summary:

A client-facing coordination and support position working closely with the sales and management teams. Ideal for someone confident, presentable, articulate, and comfortable interacting with people. No prior sales experience required:

Key Responsibilities:

  • Coordinate meetings, appointment scheduling, and follow-ups with clients.
  • Assist during client engagements, demos, events, and visits.
  • Prepare simple documents such as quotations, proposals, and meeting notes.
  • Support sales and management with day-to-day administrative tasks.
  • Maintain updated records, schedules, and client information.
  • Liaise with internal teams to ensure smooth communication and timely updates.
  • Help prepare basic presentation materials and client-facing assets when needed.

Requirements:

  • Good communication skills and confidence in client interactions.
  • Professional and well-presented in meetings and events.
  • Organized, reliable, and attentive to details.
  • Comfortable learning basic software tools (email, Word, Excel, simple CRM).
  • Enjoys meeting people and supporting a fast-paced team.
  • Prior experience in customer-facing roles (hospitality, reception, retail, events) is an advantage but not required.
